title: erigeron acris subsp. monticola
intro: Erigeron acris subsp. monticola, also known as alpine fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenes. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, alpine fleabane is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
